title: April 5
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|April|hide31=yes}}

'''April 5''' is the 95th day of the year (96th in leap years). There are 270 days remaining.
</noinclude>
*[[1930s#1939|1939]] – [[David Winters]] is born.
*[[1950s#1950|1950]] – [[A. C. Crispin]] is born.
*[[1960s#1963|1963]] – [[Arthur Adams]] is born.
*[[1960s#1967|1967]] – [[Tasia Valenza]] is born.
*[[1972]] – [[Tom Hodges|Thomas Hodges]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 9|''Star Wars Weekly'' 9]] published.
*[[1986]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 146|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 146]] published.
*[[2000]] – ''[[Star Wars Handbook 3: Dark Empire]]'' published.
*[[2004]] – "[[Clone Wars Chapter 17]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2005]] – ''[[LEGO Star Wars: The Video Game]]'' released.
*[[2012]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic UK 6.32]]'' published.
*[[2016]] – ''[[Star Wars Character Encyclopedia: Updated and Expanded]]'' published.
*2016 – [[Star Wars: Episode VII The Force Awakens|''Star Wars'': Episode VII ''The Force Awakens'']] released on [[Star Wars home video releases|DVD]] and Blu-ray.
*[[2017]] – [[Star Wars (2015) 30|''Star Wars'' (2015) 30]] published.
*2017 – [[Rogue One Adaptation 1|''Rogue One Adaptation'' 1]] published.
*[[2019]] – "[[Han Solo vs. the Space Slug - The Escape Artist]]" airs on YouTube.
*[[2021]] – [[Phil Eason]] died.
*[[2022]] – ''[[Queen's Hope]]'' published.
*2022 – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars - The Official Collectors Edition]]'' published.
*2022 – [[Doctor Aphra (script)|''Doctor Aphra'' script]] published in paperback.
*2022 – ''[[Darth Bane: Dynasty of Evil]]'' published in paperback as part of ''[[The Essential Legends Collection]]''.
*2022 – [[Darth Plagueis (novel)|''Darth Plagueis'']] published in paperback as part of ''The Essential Legends Collection''.
*2022 – [[Kenobi (novel)|''Kenobi'']] published in paperback as part of ''The Essential Legends Collection''.
*2022 – ''[[X-Wing: Wedge's Gamble]]'' published in paperback as part of ''The Essential Legends Collection''.
*2022 – [[X-Wing: Wedge's Gamble (unabridged audiobook)|''X-Wing: Wedge's Gamble'' unabridged audiobook]] released as part of ''The Essential Legends Collection''.
*2022 – ''[[LEGO Star Wars: The Skywalker Saga]]'' released.
*[[2023]] – "[[Chapter 22: Guns for Hire]]" airs on [[Disney+]].
*2023 – [[Hidden Empire 5|''Hidden Empire'' 5]] published.
*2023 – [[Star Wars (2020) 33|''Star Wars'' (2020) 33]] published.
<noinclude>
